channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Post is an obstruction and is redundant, 12th May
item.description:
Redundant obstructing post is on the pavement outside 234 Gloucester Road. I have damaged my car door on it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 232, Gloucester Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 1200x500x40mm tarmac parch number 1 plus x2 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 1800x800x50mm tarmac parch number 2 plus x1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 12th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please remove lose gravel from carriage way and footway debris from defects now repaired approx 10 meters (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic build up, 12th May
item.description:
Since the minor works at these lights the traffic all the way down the hucclecote road in the mornings has been horrendous. Its as if they have been changed and are letting less cars through. Its only been the last month or so and have had no problems prior to this. Wonder if this can be checked please to help with the traffic queues in the mornings again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: On the roundabout by ermin st as you go up past the toby carvery, 12th May
item.description:
Broken glass in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: W&N Adams Complaint, 12th May
item.description:
Two gents from W&N Adams came to do routine maintenance on the street lighting in the close. The one who was going in the basket was constantly spitting from the basket to the street, very nearly hitting the post person. Very disappointed to see such disgusting behaviour. Vehicle reg LX20 VUM
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cousley Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:
Cway pothole 15DB 500mm x 300mm x 43mm STAT PLAN REQUIRED Temporary road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 12th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 1500x1200x30mm tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 12th May
item.description:
3 way traffic lights 28 day please cur back overgrown hedge and vegetation obstructing the bus stop approx 25 meters long x 3 meters high (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
